column1: # grep-tells.tsv — TIER 1 (flat-presence) rules for audit-swiftui-previews (prev-01 … prev-09).
# severity: hard | warn | adv   (hard → runner exits 2). The runner greps each ERE over the target *.swift.
# This domain ships NO `hard` tier-1 tell on purpose — the hard-fails (prev-02/05/06/07) need containment
# or "does the previewed view read X" judgement that grep can't prove, so they are confirmed by the LLM in
# DETECT (and prev-02/prev-06 are LOCATED structurally in ast-grep/*.yml). This LOCATES only — the LLM agent
# READS each hit (SKILL.md step 3) and decides. Full ❌→✅ + sources: ../references/*.md (routed from SKILL.md).

column4: legacy PreviewProvider struct (stale for new code) → one #Preview { } per named preview (macro, iOS 17+). NOT deprecated; flag, don't call invented.
hand-rolled EnvironmentKey + EnvironmentValues boilerplate → collapse to one `@Entry var` (iOS 13+, Xcode 15 to expand). VERIFY @Entry via swiftui-ctx/Sosumi.

manual .frame sizing inside a #Preview body → use a trait: .fixedLayout(width:height:) / .sizeThatFitsLayout / .defaultLayout (prev-04). READ to confirm the .frame is the canvas hack, not view layout.
Preview(_:windowStyle:traits:body:) is visionOS-ONLY (iOS ABSENT) → on iOS use plain #Preview { } (prev-05). Do NOT wrap in #available(iOS …); it has no iOS arm.

@Query / modelContainer present — if a #Preview of this view ships NO `.modelContainer(for:…, inMemory: true)`, the canvas CRASHES on launch (prev-06). The ast-grep co-occurrence rule LOCATES the un-injected case; READ to confirm.
`.environmentObject(…)` — WRONG injector if the model is @Observable (it takes only an ObservableObject) → use `.environment(_:)` (prev-08). READ to confirm the injected type is @Observable.
inline in-memory container — if repeated + re-seeded across many #Preview s (iOS 18+), collapse to ONE PreviewModifier shared via traits: .modifier(...) (prev-09). VERIFY the iOS-18 floor.

@Environment(Model.self) — a #Preview of a view that reads it with NO `.environment(_:)` injection renders empty / CRASHES the canvas (prev-07). READ to confirm the previewed view actually requires it and nothing upstream provides it.
